name: stack_lifecycle_v1
description: Stack lifecycle management dataset covering the full state machine: draft → active → deprecated → retired. 250 examples spanning activation workflows, deprecation patterns, and rollback scenarios for operator training.

entries.notes: 250 stack lifecycle examples across three subcategories: draft-to-active (80), deprecation patterns (80), rollback scenarios (90)

provenance.review_notes: Lifecycle state machine training data for stack operators. Covers all valid transitions and common failure modes.

intent: Train the model to reason correctly about adapterOS stack lifecycle states, valid transitions, operator actions at each state, and the full rollback procedure when a deprecated stack must be reactivated.

valid_transitions.deprecated→retired: grace period expiry or explicit retire
